title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 21 - 2018: Super high today, weed's too strong

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder while very high on strong weed, discussing a recurring MRSA staph infection he suspects he has, his diminished cognitive ability that day due to weed and having homeless guests in his home, and his work on a history/timeline website involving Roman chariot racing reimagined as bicycle racing.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: the weed is too strong and noticeably reduces his intelligence and math ability
believes he has a recurring MRSA staph infection in his blood and is seeking a test and antibiotics
resents his roommate inviting homeless people over without asking, saying it lowers his IQ via their 'psychic field'
optimistic that with focused monthly work he could finish his timeline website in a year or two
rejects gloom and doom thinking; inventors can't afford to be gloomy

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thought he had cancer because of a sore, puffy spot that looked like his previous cancer, but it tested as an infection.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes he has a recurring MRSA staph infection in his blood.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle has a doctor's appointment to test for MRSA and possibly get a special antibiotic.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle mentions that MRSA can be fatal if it infects organs.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks his brain function has declined due to strong weed he recently tried.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels his IQ dropped further after his roommate invited homeless people into their home.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle was working on a math problem involving bike race speeds but couldn't solve it due to his mental state.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle was imagining a parallel universe where Romans raced bikes instead of chariots.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes he could finish his website timeline in a month if he focused on it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle speculates his website might launch the same day as an economic collapse, which could benefit him.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle considers taking a nap because he's too distracted to work on easy problems.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle stayed up all night working and only slept five hours.
